g.text: 岩 性 描 述
Dark grey marine shale with TOC-rich intervals
White-grey anhydrite with thin halite layers
Red-brown fluvial-lacustrine sandstone with conglomerate lenses
Variegated conglomerate and coarse sandstone — syn-rift deposits
São Luís–Grajaú Basin — Aptian Stratigraphy | 总厚 700m | 6 层 | 比例尺 1:2,755
